---
title: "GSE80655 Differential Expression Analysis with drugfindR"
author: "Analysis Pipeline"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Overview

This R Markdown document processes GSE80655 differential expression data and applies drugfindR for drug-gene interaction analysis.

## Load Required Packages

```{r load-packages}
library(drugfindR)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
```

## Load Processed Data

```{r load-data}
# Load count data
counts <- read_csv("../data/processed/gse80655_counts.csv")

# Load metadata
metadata <- read_csv("../data/processed/gse80655_metadata.csv")

# View data structure
cat("Counts dimensions:", dim(counts), "\n")
cat("Metadata dimensions:", dim(metadata), "\n")
cat("\nMetadata columns:\n")
print(colnames(metadata))
```

## Data Summary

```{r data-summary}
# Check sample information
cat("\nSample information:\n")
print(metadata)

# Check for any missing values
cat("\nMissing values in counts:\n")
print(colSums(is.na(counts)))

cat("\nMissing values in metadata:\n")
print(colSums(is.na(metadata)))
```

## Differential Expression Analysis

```{r dge-analysis}
# Define comparison groups
comparisons <- list(
  ancg = list(
    female = list(bpd = "female_bpd", mdd = "female_mdd", scz = "female_scz"),
    male = list(bpd = "male_bpd", mdd = "male_mdd", scz = "male_scz")
  ),
  dlpfc = list(
    female = list(bpd = "dlpfc_female_bpd", mdd = "dlpfc_female_mdd", scz = "dlpfc_female_scz"),
    male = list(bpd = "dlpfc_male_bpd", mdd = "dlpfc_male_mdd", scz = "dlpfc_male_scz")
  ),
  nacc = list(
    female = list(bpd = "nacc_female_bpd", mdd = "nacc_female_mdd", scz = "nacc_female_scz"),
    male = list(bpd = "nacc_male_bpd", mdd = "nacc_male_mdd", scz = "nacc_male_scz")
  )
)

# Run differential expression analysis for each comparison
dge_results <- list()

for (region in names(comparisons)) {
  for (gender in names(comparisons[[region]])) {
    for (diagnosis in names(comparisons[[region]][[gender]])) {
      condition <- comparisons[[region]][[gender]][[diagnosis]]

      cat("\nProcessing:", region, gender, diagnosis, "(", condition, ")\n")

      # Subset data for this comparison
      samples <- metadata %>%
        filter(condition == condition) %>%
        pull(sample_id)

      if (length(samples) < 3) {
        cat("  Skipping: insufficient samples\n")
        next
      }

      # Create design matrix
      design <- model.matrix(~0 + factor(metadata$condition))
      colnames(design) <- unique(metadata$condition)

      # Run DESeq2
      dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts[, samples],
                                    colData = metadata,
                                    design = ~ condition)

      dds <- DESeq(dds)

      # Get results
      res <- results(dds, contrast = c("condition", condition, condition))

      # Store results
      dge_results[[condition]] <- res

      cat("  Completed\n")
    }
  }
}
```

## drugfindR Analysis

```{r drugfindr-analysis}
# Run drugfindR on each comparison
drugfind_results <- list()

for (condition in names(dge_results)) {
  cat("\nRunning drugfindR on:", condition, "\n")

  tryCatch({
    # Run drugfind
    result <- drugfind(dge_results[[condition]])

    # Store results
    drugfind_results[[condition]] <- result

    cat("  Completed\n")

  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  Error:", e$message, "\n")
  })
}
```

## Summary of Results

```{r summary-results}
cat("\n=== Summary of drugfindR Results ===\n\n")

for (condition in names(drugfind_results)) {
  result <- drugfind_results[[condition]]

  cat("Comparison:", condition, "\n")
  cat("  Total genes analyzed:", nrow(result), "\n")
  cat("  Significant genes (FDR < 0.05):", sum(result$padj < 0.05), "\n")
  cat("  Significant genes (FDR < 0.01):", sum(result$padj < 0.01), "\n")
  cat("  Significant genes (FDR < 0.001):", sum(result$padj < 0.001), "\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```

## Export Results

```{r export-results}
# Export individual comparison results
for (condition in names(drugfind_results)) {
  result <- drugfind_results[[condition]]

  output_file <- paste0("results/drugfind_", condition, ".csv")
  dir.create("results", showWarnings = FALSE)

  write_csv(result, output_file)
  cat("Exported:", output_file, "\n")
}
```

## Visualizations

```{r visualizations}
# Plot significant genes per comparison
comparison_names <- names(drugfind_results)
sig_counts <- sapply(drugfind_results, function(x) sum(x$padj < 0.05))

df_plot <- data.frame(
  comparison = comparison_names,
  significant = sig_counts
) %>%
  mutate(comparison = factor(comparison, levels = comparison_names))

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = comparison, y = significant, fill = comparison)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Significant Genes by Comparison (FDR < 0.05)",
       x = "Comparison",
       y = "Number of Significant Genes") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## Session Information

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
